notes: Quick View widgets — compact at-a-glance metric cards for Sonarr, Radarr, Seerr, Tautulli, Plex, SABnzbd, qBittorrent, Transmission, Uptime Kuma, Portainer, Prowlarr, Speedtest, Proxmox, and n8n, with clickable open-on-tap, optional frame/background, and an online/offline status badge. New n8n integration for workflow automation (a Quick View of running/failed/successful executions plus an Upcoming Schedule list that computes each workflow's next run). Prowlarr and Speedtest gained Quick Views and scrolling list widgets (Prowlarr indexer health, Speedtest history). Per-widget custom display names, the Widget Library renamed to Integration Library, and assorted UI polish.
